Class DiskFileRepo

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.io.consistency.AbstractFileRepo
de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.io.consistency.DiskFileRepo
All Implemented Interfaces:
ProofDisposedListener, FileRepo
public final class DiskFileRepo extends AbstractFileRepo
This class uses a temporary directory as a store for the proof-relevant files.

  • Constructor Details

    • DiskFileRepo

      public DiskFileRepo(String proofName) throws IOException
      Initializes a new empty DiskFileRepo. This creates a new temporary directory.
      Parameters:
      proofName - name of the proof (used in the naming of the temporary directory)
      Throws:
      IOException - if an I/O error occurs, e.g. the user has not the right to create the new temporary directory

  • Method Details

    • getInputStream

      public InputStream getInputStream(URL url) throws IOException
      //////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////// ///////////////// methods for loading files and opening streams //////////////////// ////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
      Parameters:
      url - the URL of the file
      Returns:
      an InputStream to the file identified by the URL, or null
      Throws:
      IOException - on IO errors

    • createOutputStream

      public OutputStream createOutputStream(Path path) throws FileNotFoundException
      ////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////// ///////////////////////// methods for saving the repo //////////////////////////// //////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
      Parameters:
      path - the path of the file to store. The path must be relative to the base directory of the proof package.
      Returns:
      an OutputStream to the file in the FileRepo
      Throws:
      FileNotFoundException - if a file with the given path exists

    • getSaveName

      protected Path getSaveName(Path path)
      Description copied from class: AbstractFileRepo
      Return the save name for a given file.
      Specified by:
      getSaveName in class AbstractFileRepo
      Parameters:
      path - the given file (absolute or relative to the proof base directory)
      Returns:
      the name (may include subdirectories) the file should have in proof package, that is a path relative to the root of the package

    • getInputStreamInternal

      protected InputStream getInputStreamInternal(Path p) throws FileNotFoundException
      Description copied from class: AbstractFileRepo
      Can be used to get a direct InputStream to a file stored in the FileRepo. The concrete implementation depends on the concrete FileRepo.
      Specified by:
      getInputStreamInternal in class AbstractFileRepo
      Parameters:
      p - the original path (outside the FileRepo) of the requested file
      Returns:
      an InputStream of the resource or null if it has not been stored in the FileRepo before.
      Throws:
      FileNotFoundException - if the does not file exist, is a directory, or can not be opened

    • dispose

      ////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////// ///////////////////////// methods for cleaning up //////////////////////////// //////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////

      dispose in class AbstractFileRepo
